# H Nmr

**Summary**: A spectroscopic technique used to determine the structure and chemical environment of hydrogen atoms in a sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-alao|Alao, 2014]] used H NMR to identify chemical shifts and bonding potentials in surfactant systems.
